---
title: 'FREE copy of Banking Basics for Believers!'
date: '2012-10-08T04:23:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7077376579644685098'
blogger_filename: '/2012/10/free-copy-of-banking-basics-for.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'News and Current Events'
---

<br /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12.727272033691406px; line-height: 17.999998092651367px;">Banking Basics on KINDLE will be available for a limited time this week; Monday 8th through Thursday the 11th 2012; FOR FREE. You can download the KINDLE copy straight from Amazon.com.&nbsp;</span><br /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12.727272033691406px; line-height: 17.999998092651367px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12.727272033691406px; line-height: 17.999998092651367px;">Friends and Family, please download this copy to help me build my Kindle Stats. Thank you!</span><br /><br /><a href="http://www.amazon.com/Banking-Basics-for-Believers-ebook/dp/B008EO488Y/ref=sr_1_1?ie=UTF8&amp;qid=1349669940&amp;sr=8-1&amp;keywords=banking+basics+for+believers" target="_blank">Just CLICK HERE!</a><br /><br /><a href="http://www.amazon.com/Banking-Basics-for-Believers-ebook/dp/B008EO488Y/ref=sr_1_1?ie=UTF8&amp;qid=1349669940&amp;sr=8-1&amp;keywords=banking+basics+for+believers">http://www.amazon.com/Banking-Basics-for-Believers-ebook/dp/B008EO488Y/ref=sr_1_1?ie=UTF8&amp;qid=1349669940&amp;sr=8-1&amp;keywords=banking+basics+for+believers</a><br /><br /><br /><br /><iframe frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" scrolling="no" src="http://rcm.amazon.com/e/cm?lt1=_blank&amp;bc1=000000&amp;IS2=1&amp;bg1=FFFFFF&amp;fc1=000000&amp;lc1=0000FF&amp;t=your0f4d-20&amp;o=1&amp;p=8&amp;l=as4&amp;m=amazon&amp;f=ifr&amp;ref=ss_til&amp;asins=B008EO488Y" style="height: 240px; width: 120px;"></iframe>
